# Glatko.app

> Reverse-bidding services marketplace for Montenegro. Connect with verified local providers for boat services, home services, beauty, renovation, catering, and more.

Glatko is Montenegro's first reverse-bidding marketplace where customers post jobs and verified service providers compete with blind bids. Built specifically for the Adriatic coast — Boka Bay, Budva, Tivat, Kotor, Podgorica.

## What we offer

Glatko connects customers with verified service providers across 14 categories:

- **Boat services** (cleaning, antifouling, captain hire, maintenance) — primary for Boka Bay marina economy
- **Home cleaning** (regular, deep, Airbnb turnover)
- **Renovation & construction** (painting, electrical, plumbing, carpentry)
- **Beauty & wellness** (hair, nails, massage, facials)
- **Catering & food** (events, daily meals, custom cakes)
- **Garden & pool** (landscaping, pool maintenance, irrigation)
- **Events & wedding** (photography, planning, decoration)
- **Photo & video** (event, commercial, drone)
- **Health & wellness** (mobile services, fitness, nutrition)
- **Automotive** (maintenance, detailing, repair)
- **Moving & transport** (residential, commercial, packing)
- **Tutoring & education** (academic, language, music)
- **Childcare & family** (babysitting, tutoring, elder care)
- **Airbnb management** (turnover, guest support, property care)

## Key resources

- Homepage: https://glatko.app
- All services: https://glatko.app/me/services
- Become a Pro: https://glatko.app/me/become-a-pro
- Request a Service: https://glatko.app/me/request-service
- About: https://glatko.app/me/about
- How it works: https://glatko.app/me/how-it-works

## Languages

Glatko is available in 9 languages:

- Montenegrin (Latin script): https://glatko.app/me/
- English: https://glatko.app/en/
- Russian: https://glatko.app/ru/
- Turkish: https://glatko.app/tr/
- German: https://glatko.app/de/
- Italian: https://glatko.app/it/
- Serbian (Latin): https://glatko.app/sr/
- Arabic (RTL): https://glatko.app/ar/
- Ukrainian: https://glatko.app/uk/

## How it works

1. Customer posts a service request (free, anonymous)
2. Verified providers in the area submit blind bids
3. Customer reviews top 3 bids and chooses
4. In-app messaging with auto-translation (gpt-4o)
5. Job completion + review

## Differentiators

- **No upfront cost for customers** — Year 1 fully free
- **Real bid prices** (not estimated quotes)
- **Verified providers** (KYC + ratings + reviews)
- **9-language auto-translation** in messaging
- **Founding Provider Program** (50 spots, 18 months free featured badge)

## Geographic focus

- Primary: Boka Bay (Kotor, Tivat, Herceg Novi, Budva)
- Secondary: Podgorica, Bar, Ulcinj, Perast
- Tourist seasons: April–October peak (Russian, German, Turkish, Italian, French visitors)
